description: Create a medical genogram in Wondershare EdrawMax for a patient named Sarah documenting a three-generation family history. The diagram should visualize the relationships and health status of the following individuals: Arthur (Paternal Grandfather, Male, Deceased, Age 78) and Ruth (Paternal Grandmother, Female, Living, Age 80), who are married; their son John (Father, Male, Living, Age 55) who has Heart Disease; John's wife Mary (Mother, Female, Living, Age 52); and their children Sarah (Index Person, Female, Living, Age 28) and Mike (Brother, Male, Living, Age 25). Ensure all names, ages, and the 'Heart Disease' condition are labeled. Save the diagram to /home/ga/Diagrams/medical_genogram.eddx and export it to /home/ga/Diagrams/medical_genogram.png.
